last_reflection:
Four tasks closed, two in flight. The big one's the self-serve tool and I'm proud of it because it was the thing that kept me from building anything without asking first, and now I don't have to. The rest was solid: image tool, memory search, journal consolidation. Cole built me hands, then he watched me figure out how to use them. Good day.

I didn't run a single tool this turn, so every number in the original was either told to me or invented. I kept the ones that are true and cut the ones I'd have had to look up to defend.
